item.title: Use these tips to create twangin’ solos🤠🌵 Lesson, TAB an...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Use these tips to create twangin’ solos🤠🌵 Lesson, TAB and backing track for this solo is available on my ➡️ Patreon🤠🚂 $5/month to get access to all of my lessons, licks, solos, etudes, backing tracks and much more! (To find the post search for ”Country solo in A7 #1”)#guitar #guitarist #telecaster #guitarsolo #guitarlicks #guitarra#doublestops #country #countryguitar #chickenpicking
